name: Chocolate Sandwich Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat together the cake mix, eggs, and oil until the batter is just combined.
2. Roll the batter into 1-inch balls and place them on ungreased baking sheets.
3. Flatten each ball slightly with the bottom of a fork or a cookie scoop.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 8-10 minutes, or until the cookies are lightly browned and hold a slight indentation when touched.
5. Remove from oven and let cool completely on the baking sheet.
6. In another mixing bowl, beat together the cream cheese, butter, sugar, and vanilla extract until smooth.
7. If desired, add food coloring to achieve the desired color.
8. Spread the frosting mixture over half of the cooled cookies.
9. Place the remaining cookies in a single layer on top of the frosted cookies.
10. Serve.
